data.body: Fixed: 4 RED tests written for REBASE_HEAD detection (test_gate_rebase_filters_incoming_only_files, test_gate_rebase_keeps_worktree_branch_files, test_gate_rebase_failsafe_on_missing_onto, test_gate_rebase_prune_skipped_during_rebase). All tests fail as expected. .test-index updated with RED marker. Committed as 9dc63abb.
